# CTLineGetGlyphRuns(_:)

**Function**

Returns the array of glyph runs that make up the line object.

## Declaration

```swift
func CTLineGetGlyphRuns(_ line: CTLine) -> CFArray
```

## Parameters

- **line**: The line whose glyph run array is returned.

## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] containing the CTRun objects that make up the line.

## Getting Line Data

- **CTLineGetGlyphCount(_:)**: Returns the total glyph count for the line object.
- **CTLineGetStringRange(_:)**: Gets the range of characters that originally spawned the glyphs in the line.
- **CTLineGetPenOffsetForFlush(_:_:_:)**: Gets the pen offset required to draw flush text.
